scripts.build: pnpm --filter effect-sql-schema build && pnpm --filter effect-zero build && pnpm --filter typhoon-zero... build && pnpm exec effect-zero generate --config ./effect-zero.config.ts --output ./src/zero/schema.ts --skip-declare --format --force && vp pack
scripts.db:generate: pnpm --filter effect-sql-schema build && pnpm --filter effect-zero build && pnpm --filter effect-sql-kit build && pnpm exec effect-sql-kit generate
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter effect-sql-schema build && pnpm --filter effect-zero build && pnpm --filter effect-sql-kit build && pnpm exec effect-sql-kit migrate
scripts.db:push: pnpm --filter effect-sql-schema build && pnpm --filter effect-zero build && pnpm --filter effect-sql-kit build && pnpm exec effect-sql-kit push
